summary: Agentic delivery now includes capability enablement, Skill/MCP routing, development operating system governance, Codex task package blueprint, human supervision, and learning routes before product-code execution.

checks.evidence: capability_enablement_plan.md includes capability_gaps, skill_reuse_decision, new_skill_candidates, mcp_candidates, harness_requirements, and human_approval_required.
skill_mcp_routing_plan.md includes stage_routing, steward_assignment, skill_boundaries, mcp_boundaries, source_trace, and fallback.
development_operating_system_plan.md includes chief_steward, sub_stewards, random_audit, efficiency_audit, teacher, preference_cache, skill_update_proposal, and harness.
codex_task_package_blueprint.md includes task_types, capability_enablement_tasks, skill_creation_tasks, mcp_integration_tasks, registry_harness_tasks, validation_commands, and learning_route.
Each task in codex_task_packages.md includes allowed_write_paths and forbidden_write_paths.
human_supervision_plan.md defines prd_scope, database_schema, external_api, mcp_integration, registry_harness, model_change, github_push, destructive_data, and skill_update gates.
agentic_delivery_plan.md defines feedback_learning_loop and routes generic lessons to supervised Skill proposals.

remaining_risks: Implementation repository structure may differ from the generic allowed_write_paths and must be adapted after the repository-understanding task.
MCP integrations are not active yet; each integration still requires source trace, permission scope, and human approval.
Model quality still depends on official-doc verification and benchmark results.
